title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zerodha Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zerodha Advisory Limited:
Zerodha Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
